name: Erethdor's grimoire
hoverSummary: Pocket-slot book from Solak that increases critical strike chance while active.
detailLines: Pocket-slot item obtained as a rare drop from Solak.
When active, increases critical strike chance by 12%.
The increase is additive with other critical strike chance boosts such as Biting.
implementationNotes: Wiki-verified with Playwright on 2026-04-16. Charge consumption and Solak arena charge preservation are not simulated; the configured active effect applies its +12% critical strike chance.
